name: Linguine with Tomatoes and Jalapeno
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Remove the white papery skin from the garlic, but do not peel or separate the cloves. Wrap the whole head of garlic in foil and bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Let cool for 10 minutes.
3. Separate the cloves and squeeze out the garlic pulp. Discard the skins.
4. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add jalapeno pepper and saute for 30 seconds.
5. Add tomatoes and saute for 2 minutes. Remove skillet from heat and stir in the garlic pulp.
6. Add pasta, half of the Parmesan cheese, oregano, and anchovy paste; toss well.
7. Sprinkle each serving with remaining cheese and additional pepper, if desired.
